## Problem

What can't you do today, or what is harder than it should be?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like PatchManager to do. Note whether it fits the project
constraints: evidence-led reporting, single deployable script, PowerShell 5.1
floor, no forced reboots, machine state restored on exit.

## Use case

Personal device, commercial estate, or both? Roughly how many devices?

## Alternatives considered

Workarounds you've tried or other tools that partially cover this.
